name: Team Cole
subject: Cole Outlines Good Paying Jobs Plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --
Last week was a busy week on the campaign trail. The week was highlighted with Bill Cole [outlining](http://www.billcolewv.com/issues_jobs?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=1) his plan to create good paying jobs in West Virginia at the annual Business Summit hosted by the West Virginia Chamber of Commerce. _The Intelligencer_ had high praise for Bill’s plan [calling](http://www.billcolewv.com/turning_w_va_economy_around?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=2) it the right plan to turn West Virginia’s economy around. You can listen to Bill’s full interview this morning on _TalkLine_ about his jobs plan [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fbill-cole-discusses-jobs-plan-on-talkline&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=3).

Over the weekend**Team Cole** was out in full force putting up signs across the state. And, a group of supporters marched in the Marmet Labor Day Parade. Kanawha County Chair Carolyn Stricklen did a great job [sharing](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwvmetronews.com%2F2016%2F09%2F05%2Fmarmet-holds-annual-labor-day-parade%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=4) Bill Cole’s plans with the crowd after the parade.

On Saturday, Bill walked in the Italian Heritage Parade in Clarksburg. Then attended the WVU home opener before finishing the day at the Barbour County Fair.
Bill spent Labor Day travelling from Charleston to Martinsburg for the annual Labor Day Breakfast. He had the chance to talk with Hans Fogel on _Panhandle Live_ before heading off to Brooke County for Doc and Peggy Bahnsen’s annual [dove shoot](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.weirtondailytimes.com%2Fnews%2Flocal-news%2F2016%2F09%2Fannual-dove-shoot-held%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=5). Doc and Peggy are the Co-Chairs of [Veterans for Cole](http://www.billcolewv.com/veterans_for_cole?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=6).

If you would like to help out now that the campaign is in full swing click [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/volunteer?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=7). **TEAM COLE**
[http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day&n=8)

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Let's seize this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

Fellow Conservative,

On Thursday, only two months will stand between us and what could be the most impactful election of our lifetimes.

But if you spend your day watching the cable news networks, you'd think the election is all but over.

**The pundits on TV are predicting a giant "Democratic Wave."**

Let me tell you this: **They're wrong.**

Across the board, conservatives are rallying support in districts traditionally held by liberals. We're as confident as we've ever been about this election.

subject: Stop Trump's Voter Intimidation Scheme
body:
Tell the Department of Justice: Stop voter suppression in 2016 (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/)

Sign the petition to the Department of Justice:
"Take all necessary measures to stop Republican voter suppression in 2016. Investigate the Trump campaign's 'Trump Election Observers' program and do everything in your power to stop Republican voter intimidation and suppression efforts."

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/)

Dear Activist,

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/)

Donald Trump is laying the groundwork for massive voter intimidation and suppression in November's election. After warning against "cheating" in "certain parts of the state" in a recent speech in Pennsylvania, the Trump campaign rolled out a new effort to recruit "Trump Election Observers" to "Stop Crooked Hillary From Rigging This Election."1

It's a desperate attempt to suppress African-American and Latino votes and steal the election – and it might just be illegal under a 1982 consent decree that prohibits the Republican National Committee and its agents from engaging in election observation that intimidates voters or suppresses their right to vote.2

The Department of Justice (DOJ) must investigate the Trump campaign's "Trump Election Observers" program and crack down on any attempt to intimidate or suppress voters this fall.

Tell the Department of Justice: Stop Trump's voter intimidation scheme. Click here to sign the petition. (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/)

Donald Trump's plan to recruit "election observers" is just the latest example of Republicans attempting to shrink the electorate for electoral gain. The Republican Party has a long and troubling history of engaging in voter intimidation under the guise of preventing fraud, dating back to Jim-Crow era laws that were paired with poll taxes and literacy tests to suppress African-American votes.3 In fact, efforts to use armed "observers" to intimidate African-American and Latino voters in New Jersey in 1981 lead to the consent decree that prohibits the Republican National Committee from deploying election observers to this day.

The fact is, widespread voter fraud is a myth that Republican politicians invented to justify voter intimidation efforts and make it harder for African-Americans and Latinos to vote.4 The real problem, the one that can affect the outcome of our elections if we're not vigilant, is voter suppression.

Tell the Department of Justice: Stop Trump's voter intimidation scheme. Click here to sign the petition. (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/)

As Trump's polling numbers collapsed following the conventions, he began warning his supporters that the election would be rigged, telling Fox News on August 1 that "they are going to vote 10 times" and that "we'd better be careful, because that election is going to be rigged."5

With the Trump campaign now actively recruiting "election observers" and working to stoke fears among the extreme right-wing base about the prospect of widespread voter fraud, the DOJ should be ramping up its efforts to prevent voter intimidation tactics and protect the integrity of the election. But according to a DOJ fact sheet from July, its deployment of federal election observers this year will cover only five states and will be the smallest since the Voting Rights Act was passed in 1965.6

With Republican officials in control of the administration of elections in most states, the DOJ is our last line of defense for protecting the right to vote. We need it to remain vigilant, deploy all resources at its disposal and aggressively crack down on any attempt to intimidate voters or otherwise suppress the vote in 2016.

Tell the Department of Justice: Stop Trump's voter intimidation scheme. Click the link below to sign the petition:

https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/ (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/)

Thanks for taking a stand for voting rights,

Josh Nelson, Deputy Political Director
CREDO Action from Working Assets (http://www.credoaction.com)

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/doj_votesuppression_dems/)

References:

Ari Berman, "Donald Trump is Encouraging Intimidation and Racial Profiling at the Polls (https://www.thenation.com/article/donald-trump-is-encouraging-intimidation-and-racial-profiling-at-the-polls/) ," The Nation, August 15, 2016. Rick Hasen, "Donald Trump May Be Violating RNC Consent Decree Aimed at Voter Intimidation (http://electionlawblog.org/?p=85289) ," Election Law Blog, August 12, 2016. ibid. Justin Levitt, "A comprehensive investigation of voter impersonation finds 31 credible incidents out of one billion ballots cast (https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/wonk/wp/2014/08/06/a-comprehensive-investigation-of-voter-impersonation-finds-31-credible-incidents-out-of-one-billion-ballots-cast/) ," The Washington Post, August 6, 2014. Janell Ross, "How Donald Trump, defender of political incorrectness, is blowing a loud racial dog whistle on voter ID (https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/the-fix/wp/2016/08/03/how-donald-trump-defender-of-political-incorrectness-is-blowing-a-loud-racial-dog-whistle-on-voter-id/) ," The Washington Post, August 3, 2016. Julia Harte, "Exclusive: U.S. curtails federal election observers (http://www.reuters.com/article/us-usa-election-voting-observers-exclusi-idUSKCN0ZX0QR) ," Reuters, July 17, 2016.
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDgvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS8xMzgwNDg0Nw==

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: My Faith Votes
subject: A Conversation with Samuel Rodriguez - My Faith Matters LIVE
body:
My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE: A
Conversation with Samuel Rodriguez
Host: Megan West
Topic: Discussing Issues
Important to the Latino Community
Date: SEPT 8TH
Time: 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)

"True faith welcomes questions;
false faiths discourage and prohibit them." - Pastor Samuel
Rodriguez

Samuel Rodriguez is President of
the National Hispanic Christian Leadership Conference, the
nation's largest Hispanic Christian organization representing
millions of Evangelicals and more than 40,000 U.S. Churches. As a
leading spokesperson for Hispanic Evangelicals, Rev. Samuel
Rodriguez has been a featured speaker at the White House and
frequently meets and consults members of both parties in Congress
and in White House meetings on social justice, Latino and values
issues.

Sign up now for this LIVE EVENT
on THURSDAY, SEPT 8TH 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT).

As a leading spokesperson for
Hispanic Evangelicals, Rev. Samuel Rodriguez has been a featured
speaker at the White House and frequently meets and consults
members of both parties in Congress and in White House meetings
on social justice, Latino and values issues. His non-partisan
commitment enables Samuel to meet with both sides of the aisle
while, above all, contextualizing the nexus of both Kingdom and
Society.

Rodriguez is regularly featured,
profiled and quoted by the Washington Post, CNN, Fox News, NBC
Telemundo, ABC, NPR, Chicago Tribune, Christianity Today,
Newsweek, Univision, NY Times, The Wall St. Journal, CNN
Español, Bill Moyers, Boston Globe, Atlanta Constitution,
Ministries Today, The Christian Post, Charisma, CBN, TBN and many
others.

Join us on THURSDAY SEPT 8TH 8PM
(ET) / 5PM (PT), for this interactive, Q&A TeleForum. We
guarantee that this will be one of the most enlightening
TeleForums in our series.

My Faith Votes exists to inspire
and motivate Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan
movement of the Church in America.

body:
Please make a contribution to help fund our winning voter contact program. |

Peter, are you ready to put an end to the failed era of President Obama and elect Donald Trump as America’s 45th president? Yes No On November 8, we are going to elect a leader who understands the fundamental principle that our country belongs to We The People -- not the Washington special interests. We are going to start fixing the disasters created by Obama and Hillary Clinton, and usher in a new American future of freedom, safety, and prosperity. But to successfully do it, we’re going to have to work harder than ever before over the 62 remaining days. And we’re going to need your help, Peter. Please make a contribution of $100, $75, $50, $35 or any amount you can spare to help sustain our nationwide, state-of-the-art plan to usher in a massive Republican victory this November. Today, the majority of our staff don’t even work at our Party HQ. They live and work in the battleground states that are critical to electing Mr. Trump and maintaining control of our House and Senate majorities. And to ensure we’re maximizing our potential, we’ve equipped our staffers with the most sophisticated, targeted voter contact program in history. Peter, I couldn’t be prouder of our team. And I’m deeply honored by the sacrifices they’re making to win big this November. Now I’m turning to you to help us fund and sustain our massive campaign operation all the way to November 8. Thank you, Chris Carr Political Director Republican National Committee CONTRIBUTE $100

Friend, Here's something you wouldn't know if you just listened to Greg Gianforte's non-stop commercials:

Unemployment is down and wages are up. As reported by the _AP_ , Montana had _"its biggest one-year jump in real wage growth since officials began analyzing the data in 1990. "_

Mr. Gianforte continues to trot out silly gimmicks and lob false attacks to distract Montanans from Steve's excellent record of fostering economic growth.

| **For Immediate Release:**
September 7th, 2016

**Media Contact** : Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Phil Scott Sets Healthcare Reform Goals**
_Targets more affordable insurance options for families, businesses and a more cost-effective delivery system_
Burlington, Vt. –Phil Scott released a healthcare plan today detailing his approach for getting healthcare reform back on track and increasing affordable choices for families and businesses.

“Over the last six years of one-party rule, healthcare costs have increased by well over twenty percent,” Scott noted Wednesday. “To get healthcare costs under control, Vermont needs to be honest about the scope of the challenge,” Scott continued. “Politicians have been promising quick-fixes for far too long. The reality is, we will not be able to fix the problem on day one, and it is going to take focus and discipline to get healthcare reform back on track.”

“My Administration will be focused on expanding affordable options for families and small businesses, getting Medicaid and long-term care costs under control, and putting comprehensive healthcare reform back on track as quickly and responsibly as possible,” Scott added. “And we can start by solving the problems with Vermont Health Connect and giving Vermonters more affordable insurance choices.”

To put the state back on a track toward affordable healthcare for everyone, Scott’s plan includes, but is not limited to:
* Setting a clear, results-focused goal of offering every Vermonter affordable health care choices.
* Fully implementing, and enforcing, the law requiring price transparency in Vermont’s healthcare system. This will enable Vermonters to make better and more informed choices about their care.
* Lobbying the federal government to amend the federal Affordable Care Act to allow Vermonters to purchase insurance across state lines, while maintaining our commitment to consumer protections and parity.
* Work with the Green Mountain Care Board and providers to expedite a logical transition to a payment system that fairly compensates providers for treatment that emphasizes quality and outcomes, not just the amount of care they deliver.
* Coordinating with Vermont’s insurers and small businesses to reform our insurance marketplace so there are products that better reward Vermonters for personal responsibility, wellness and healthy choices.
* Eliminating the legal necessity for providers to practice “defensive medicine” that increases costs on patients.

Among other provisions, Scott’s plan also calls for containing Medicaid and long-term care costs under control. Read Phil Scott’s full plan at _[http://www.philscott.org/position-papers/affordable-accessible-healthcare/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=67325722ec&e=19cebfe173)_.

**Phil Scott: Listening, Learning & Leading **
Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters, fighting for affordability and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [_www.philscott.org_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f144e47542&e=19cebfe173)

body:
Dear Peter,

The latest attacks from liberal democrats and Chris Koster on Purple Heart and Bronze Star recipient Eric Greitens are disgusting--and show just how desperate Chris Koster really is.

First, Eric's opponents launched vicious and false attacks suggesting he was never a Navy SEAL and questioning his military record.

Now, they're coming after The Mission Continues, which Eric started with his own combat pay. Chris Koster should be ashamed of himself for attacking an organization that helps veterans.
But we aren't surprised. This is what desperate career politicians do. They will say or do anything to try to hold onto power. We need your help to fight back. [Chip in $3, $5, $10](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=70915ace12&e=84041254e6), or whatever you can today to help us set the record straight.
With your help, we will win and send career politicians packing. And with your support, we will take Missouri in a new direction.

Best,
AC
Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager
P.S. I thought you'd enjoy reading the full press release, so it is forwarded below.
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Press** <team@ericgreitens.com>
Date: Wed, Sep 7, 2016 at 12:24 PM
Subject: RELEASE: Chris Koster Attacks a Veterans Charity

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
September 7, 2016
**RELEASE: Chris Koster Attacks a Veterans Charity**
St. Louis, Missouri -- Corrupt career politician Chris Koster has somehow found a new low. Despite never having served in the military, he launched a new ad today attacking The Mission Continues, a universally praised veterans non-profit. Chris Koster's false attacks on an organization that has changed the lives of thousands of veterans are despicable.
Greitens' Campaign Manager, Austin Chambers, released the following statement: "Eric Greitens served four tours of duty for his country, came home, and then proudly served his fellow veterans. Sadly, the only thing big spending career politician Chris Koster has ever served is himself."
_**THE FACTS:**_
* Eric Greitens did not collect a salary during his first two years with The Mission Continues. He donated his combat pay to found the organization and slept on an air mattress in a spartan apartment for months to get it started.
* The Mission Continues has awarded more than 1,600 paid fellowships to veterans around the country, brought over 8,000 veterans together in service platoons, and engaged thousands of volunteers to serve their communities.
* From 2008-2013, The Mission Continues spent an average of 83.3% of its funds directly on its core programs and beneficiaries--well above the recommended 65% from the Charities Review Council.
* The Mission Continues never hired "image consultants" for Greitens. [A media firm](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=236a018178&e=84041254e6) worked for the organization on marketing materials, outreach, events, and web design to help them reach more veterans in need.
* The Mission Continues has been nationally recognized for its effectiveness and efficiency: It has a perfect four-star rating from the watchdog group Charity Navigator and was awarded the Better Business Bureau Torch Award for "exceptional ethical business practices and customer service."
* In 2010, The Manhattan Institute named the Mission Continues one of the five most socially innovative organizations in the country, highlighting it as an example "of the strength and honor of our military men and women both on the battlefield and on the home front."
* In 2011, the Social Venture Network, a leading network of entrepreneurs and investors, named Eric Greitens and The Mission Continues as one of its Innovation Award winners. The award recognizes the most promising social ventures and innovative entrepreneurs in the country.
* One of The Mission Continues' early fellows, Tim Smith, described his time with The Mission Continues as [life-saving](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=be919d8d14&e=84041254e6).

_**WHAT OTHERS SAY ABOUT THE MISSION CONTINUES:**_
**PBS:** "The world appears to be a better place for many of the vets who have gone through The Mission Continues. A study by the Center for Social Development at Washington University in St. Louis found that over 70 percent of Fellows have furthered their education, and 80 percent have found civilian employment." (PBS, "The Mission Continues," May 31st, 2012)
**National Journal:** "Williamson...opened the email about The Mission Continues, a nonprofit that helps veterans integrate into their communities. The St. Louis-based group wound up being his lifeline...Williamson said his application for a Mission Continues fellowship was 'my Hail Mary.'" (National Journal, "Paying Veterans to Give Back," January 14th, 2014)
**Fortune Magazine:** "In 2007, Greitens took his commitment back to the frontlines, founding a nonprofit organization that serves post-9/11 veterans by deploying them to service projects across the country...and changing the way Americans, and the veterans themselves, think about veterans." (Fortune Magazine, "The World's 50 Greatest Leaders," March 20th, 2014)
**The Riverfront Times:** "Matthew Trotter, the [Mission Continues'] first fellow and a former Navy electronics engineer who severely injured his ankles and legs not long after the March 2003 invasion of Iraq, calls the program 'a godsend.'" (The Riverfront Times, "Captain America," April 9th, 2008)
**The Military Times:** "Researchers tracking The Mission Continues fellowship program...found that 90 percent of the participants believed the community work helped their chances of finding a job. More than 80 percent said the volunteer experience encouraged them to seek out a better career." (The Military Times, "Study: Volunteer work could help vets' careers, November 20th, 2014)
**The Center for New American Security:** "[The Mission Continues Fellowship Program] supports veteran reintegration across all four dimensions of well-being described in the CNAS Veteran Wellness Model, with a specific focus on purpose and social relationships...This service opportunity provides them with a renewed sense of purpose in life, a stronger social network, professional development support and the broader health benefits of serving others by volunteering." (CNAS, "The Mission Continues: A Case Study of the Well After Service Model, November 20th, 2014)
**The St. Louis Post-Dispatch:** "Tim Smith didn't find work for five months...He had been in some tough spots when in Iraq. When he got home, he was anxious when he heard loud noises, watched rooftops when he was outdoors, became nervous at traffic lights and sometimes reflexively would look for a weapon under his bed...The Mission Continues, an innovative service organization whose headquarters are in St. Louis, arranged a paid fellowship for Tim. It enabled him to work full-time helping veterans." (St. Louis Post-Dispatch, "'For us the living' Our view," May 25th, 2009)
**Time Magazine:** "[Mike] Pereira was working for a veterans' service organization called the Mission Continues, in St. Louis....Mike had lived through some tough times too after leaving the Army. He too had been living alone, on the couch. He too had put a gun to his head. But he was living with a purpose now....Mike talked nonstop about the Mission Continues and its leader, Eric Greitens, about the peace he'd found." (Time Magazine, "Can Service Save Us?", June 20th, 2013)
**The New York Times:** "The organization offered post-9/11 veterans fellowships: stipends to spend 20 hours a week for 6 months doing something they cared about. Among other projects, fellows work with kids in foster care, build houses with Habitat for Humanity and do disaster preparedness with the American Red Cross. Many chose to help fellow veterans, training service animals for veterans with disabilities or teaching homeless veterans to ride horses....The fellows perform valuable work for their communities, and ease their own transition to civilian life." (The New York Times, "Veterans at Home, on a Mission of Compassion" February 26th, 2014)

Trump just had his best fundraising month so far | Derek --

I have some not-great news to share with you: Every single day this month, we’ve fallen short of our 24-hour fundraising goal.

I'm bringing that up because I'm pretty sure Donald Trump isn't seeing that sort of trend. He just announced that August was his best fundraising month of the election -- his supporters chipped in about $90 million.

Meanwhile, he’s closing the gap in the national polls and even pulling ahead in some key states. He’s got organizers on the ground, he’s got ads on the air, and he’s taking advantage of the media to get in front of voters as much as he possibly can.

Derek, it's not enough to know we’re right when it comes to policy and values. It's not enough to know our candidate is the right person to be the next president.

There are 62 days left in this election, and if we get outworked or outspent, we're going to lose.

body:
Democrats Attack Greitens Days Before Missouri GOP Primary

By Maggie Severns, POLITICO
7/28/2016 5:17 PM EST

A political group affiliated with the Democratic Governors Association is reserving ad time to attack GOP gubernatorial candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri, seeking to affect the race just five days before Republicans choose their nominee from a crowded field.

Two sources tracking media spending in the state said that Jobs and Opportunity, a 527 group funded by the DGA, has booked about a half-million dollars in broadcast TV and additional radio spending attacking Greitens. The DGA did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

The ad is set to start airing Friday. Audio, which a source said was from the ad, criticizes Greitens for accepting money from a donor accused of sexually abusing a woman.

"What does this victim accused of human trafficking have to do with your vote for governor? Well a man accused of abusing her for 13 years gave Eric Greitens $1 million," a narrator says in the ad. "While others returned his money, Greitens said he was honored to take it."

Greitens, a former Navy SEAL and political newcomer, has been picking up steam in the competitive GOP primary because of his charisma and status as an outsider. The ad is a clear indication that Democrats would rather not face Greitens in the general election. Polls have found the race between Greitens and the three other candidates extremely close, but a SurveyUSA poll released this week did find Greitens leading the pack with 25 percent, with opponent John Brunner behind him at 21 percent.

Missouri was the site of a notorious instance of Democratic primary meddling four years ago, when Democratic Sen. Claire McCaskill's campaign aired ads casting GOP Rep. Todd Akin as conservative before his Senate primary. Akin won the three-way Republican race and promptly imploded in the general election, losing to McCaskill by more than 15 percentage points.

The DGA tried to influence Republicans' gubernatorial primary in Colorado in 2014, funding a group that tried to boost conservative ex-Rep. Tom Tancredo. But the effort prompted a backlash and Tancredo ultimately lost the GOP primary.

The winner in the Missouri GOP primary will face current Attorney General Chris Koster, a moderate and rising star in the Democratic Party, in the general election.

name: Donna Edwards
subject: More black women in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend,
We have an opportunity to do something historic right now - increase the number of black women in Congress by 15%.
California Attorney General Kamala Harris running for the US Senate in California, former Orlando Chief of Police Val Demings running for Congress in Florida and former Delaware Secretary of Labor Lisa Blunt Rochester running for Congress in Delaware all need our help.
[**Will you chip in to help these women make history? Rush a donation right now.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff49/767134fb/5c3c987a/4338192c/2297666188/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blackwomenincongress?refcode=CDE&amount=10.00")
[](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff49/767134fb/5c3c987a/4338192c/2297666188/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blackwomenincongress?refcode=CDE&amount=10.00")
This is not just about history, these are impressive and progressive candidates.
* [**Kamala Harris**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff49/767134fb/5c3c987a/4338192c/2297666188/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blackwomenincongress?refcode=CDE&amount=10.00") is running for Senate in California on a bold platform for a smarter and fairer criminal justice system, reforming predatory for-profit schools that take advantage of our communities, and is a strong supporter of a woman's right to choose.
* [**Val Demings**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff49/767134fb/5c3c987a/4338192c/2297666188/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blackwomenincongress?refcode=CDE&amount=10.00") is running for Congress in Florida and will be in a tough fight, but she knows what that's like and can win if we stand with her. With her background as a reformer in law enforcement, she will bring a new voice sorely needed to Washington.
* [**Lisa Blunt Rochester**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff49/767134fb/5c3c987a/4338192c/2297666188/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blackwomenincongress?refcode=CDE&amount=10.00") is running for Congress in Delaware. She was the state's first African-American Deputy Secretary of Health and Social Services and her work served as a roadmap to improve the internal and external relations of the State Police.

I'm excited to announce I'm partnering with The Collective PAC to support these women and other candidates running for public office because this is so important.
We cannot build a representative democracy without supporting more candidates of color. **This means stepping up when they need us most. Right now.**
[**Can I count on you to join me in this fight? Rush a donation right now directly to their campaigns.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff49/767134fb/5c3c987a/4338192c/2297666188/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blackwomenincongress?refcode=CDE&amount=10.00")
Let's make sure that when Secretary Hillary Clinton becomes our next President, she has a truly representative and progressive Congress to have her back.
Thank you,
Donna
